description.p: Flowe is a privacy-first personal finance tracker. All data stays on your device — nothing is sent to any server.

ul.li: Monthly budget planner with income and expense categories
Debt snowball calculator with payoff timeline
Net worth tracker with asset and liability snapshots
Event split calculator for group expenses
Transactions rebuilt: month navigator, spending summary, grouped by date
Tab restructure: Budget and Transactions sub-tabs, Snowball/Net Worth/Events top-level
Split calculator total now saves correctly
Font size no longer resets when adding or deleting rows
Status bar and gesture bar overlap fixed on Android and iOS
Linux package renamed from flo to flowe with automatic data migration
